account_onboarding_form.description.welc: Let's set up your workspace. Choose a name and a unique URL to get started
account_onboarding_form.description.desk: Download 8th Wall for the optimal developer experience
account_onboarding_form.url_guideline.re: Pick a name you're proud of—one that's relevant to your company or project.
account_onboarding_form.url_guideline.ca: This URL will be the permanent home for your projects and cannot be changed later.
account_type_card_select.description.web: Create custom AR experiences for the mobile web using JavaScript and WebGL
account_type_card_select.description.cam: Instantly create AR cameras for the mobile web by uploading 3D models
account_type_card_select.description.uni: Build mobile AR apps using Unity and deploy to iOS and Android simultaneously
claim_url_step.status.unavailable: <1>This URL is already in use.</1> Please try another one.
claim_url_step.status.invalid: <1>Please update your URL.</1> Make sure it’s {{min}}-{{max}} characters long and only contains lowercase letters and numbers.
error.failed_to_update_account: Failed to update your workspace. Please try again.
insufficient_permissions_step.notificati: The {{workspaceName}} workspace that you are a member of is currently inactive. Come back once the workspace owner has re-activated it.
insufficient_permissions_step.descriptio: You can kickstart your journey by creating a new workspace, absolutely free!
